mapper.sql: id, role_code, role_name, status, parent_role_id, allow_create_child, sort, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_role WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_role WHERE role_code = #{roleCode} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role ( role_code, role_name, status, parent_role_id, allow_create_child, sort, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted, version ) VALUES ( #{roleCode}, #{roleName}, #{status}, #{parentRoleId}, #{allowCreateChild}, #{sort}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW(), 0, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_role SET role_name = #{roleName}, status = #{status}, parent_role_id = #{parentRoleId}, allow_create_child = #{allowCreateChild}, sort = #{sort}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_role SET deleted = 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT r.id FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1
SELECT r.role_code FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1
SELECT FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_role WHERE deleted = 0
AND (role_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR role_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
